ddls:
CREATE TABLE "cookies" (
  "cookie_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each cookie */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the cookie */,
  "domain_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the domain that set the cookie */,
  "purpose_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the purpose of the cookie */,
  "expiry_date" TEXT /* Date the cookie expires */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of cookie (e.g., HTTP, HTTPS) */,
  "third_party" INTEGER /* Indicates if the cookie is set by a third-party domain */,
  "creation_date" TEXT /* Date when the cookie was created */,
  "last_accessed_date" TEXT /* Date when the cookie was last accessed */,
  "cookie_size" INTEGER /* Size of the cookie in bytes */,
  "path" TEXT /* Path for which the cookie is valid */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("cookie_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_cookies_purpose_id FOREIGN KEY ("purpose_id") REFERENCES purposes ("purpose_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_cookies_domain_id FOREIGN KEY ("domain_id") REFERENCES domains ("domain_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "domains" (
  "domain_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each domain */,
  "domain_name" TEXT /* Name of the domain */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the domain */,
  "third_party" INTEGER /* Indicates if the domain is a third-party domain */,
  "registered_date" TEXT /* Date when the domain was registered */,
  "last_activity_date" TEXT /* Date of the last activity on the domain */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("domain_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "purposes" (
  "purpose_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each purpose */,
  "purpose_name" TEXT /* Name of the purpose */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the purpose */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the purpose (e.g., 'Advertising', 'Analytics') */,
  "legal_basis" TEXT /* Legal basis for the purpose (e.g., 'Consent', 'Legitimate Interest') */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("purpose_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "consent_status" INTEGER /* Consent status of the user (true if consented, false if declined) */,
  "registration_date" TEXT /* Date when the user registered */,
  "last_login_date" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  "user_role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., 'Admin', 'User') */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "cookie_user_consents" (
  "consent_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each consent */,
  "cookie_id" INTEGER /* ID of the cookie */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "consent_date" TEXT /* Date the user consented or declined the cookie */,
  "consent_status" INTEGER /* Consent status of the user (true if consented, false if declined) */,
  "consent_version" TEXT /* Version of the consent form accepted by the user */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the consent was given */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the browser used */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("consent_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_cookie_user_consents_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_cookie_user_consents_cookie_id FOREIGN KEY ("cookie_id") REFERENCES cookies ("cookie_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "ad_networks" (
  "network_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each advertising network */,
  "network_name" TEXT /* Name of the advertising network */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the advertising network */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the network (e.g., 'Active', 'Inactive') */,
  "integration_date" TEXT /* Date when the network was integrated with the platform */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("network_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "cookie_ad_networks" (
  "association_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each association */,
  "cookie_id" INTEGER /* ID of the cookie */,
  "network_id" INTEGER /* ID of the advertising network */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("association_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_cookie_ad_networks_network_id FOREIGN KEY ("network_id") REFERENCES ad_networks ("network_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_cookie_ad_networks_cookie_id FOREIGN KEY ("cookie_id") REFERENCES cookies ("cookie_id")
)
